taxon.title: NCBI Taxonomy ID or name (common or scientific) at any taxonomic rank

refseq_only.title: If true, limit results to RefSeq genomes.

annotated_only.title: If true, limit results to annotated genomes.

host.title: Limit to genomes isolated from the specified host species (NCBI Taxonomy ID, common or scientific name).

pangolin_classification.title: Limit to SARS-CoV-2 genomes from the specified Pango lineage.

geo_location.title: Limit to genomes collected from the specified geographic location.

usa_state.title: Limit to genomes collected from the specified U.S. state (two-letter abbreviation).

complete_only.title: Limit to genomes designated as complete, as defined by the submitter.

format.title: Choose download format (tsv, csv or jsonl)

use_psg.title: Experimental approach to retrieving sequence data.
